Palawan's Most-Loved Freediving Experience

Discover the Ocean Within

Learn to freedive in the crystal-clear waters of Palawan with Agatha — certified instructor, patient guide, and your companion on a life-changing underwater journey.

What We Offer

Your Freediving Journey Starts Here

From your very first breath-hold to advanced depth training — every experience is guided with patience, safety, and a deep love for the ocean.

Beginner Freediving

New to freediving? Start here. Learn breathing techniques, equalization, and safe diving practices in shallow, calm waters — all at your pace.

Advanced Courses

Already certified? Refine your technique, increase your depth, and master advanced equalization methods with personalized coaching.

Mermaid Training

Transform into a mermaid. Swim with a monofin tail, learn graceful underwater tricks, and experience the pure joy of mermaid movement.

Guided Dives

Explore Palawan's most breathtaking dive spots — from Puerto Princesa to El Nido — with someone who knows these waters intimately.

2-Day Intensive

Short on time? Our popular two-day course packs theory, pool training, and open-water dives into a transformative weekend experience.

Private Sessions

One-on-one instruction tailored to your goals — whether you're overcoming water anxiety or training for a personal depth record.

View All Courses→

Certified Instructor

5+ years teaching in Palawan

Meet Your Instructor

I'm Agatha — and the ocean has been my second home since I was a child.

I discovered freediving in 2005 and never looked back. After years of diving in Boracay and training under incredible mentors, I now teach in the pristine waters of Palawan — sharing the same passion that changed my life.

My goal is simple: to help you discover the physical and mental freedom that comes from freediving — whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced diver looking to go deeper.

Read My StoryBook a Session

Dive Locations

Palawan: One of the World's Most Beautiful Dive Destinations

Train in warm, crystal-clear waters surrounded by stunning limestone mountains. From the sheltered bays of Puerto Princesa to the legendary seascapes of El Nido — every session is set against a backdrop you'll never forget.

Puerto Princesa
El Nido

Let's Dive In

Send me a message to book your class, ask about courses, or just say hello. I'll get back to you within 24 hours — usually much sooner.
